channel.title: NKSCoder Blog — Nitesh Kumar Singh
channel.description: NKSCoder blog by Nitesh Kumar Singh — AI developer, Python coder. Ollama AI, Django fintech, LLM & backend engineering case studies.

item.title: Building AI Bank Statement Analysis with Ollama on NVIDIA GPU
item.description: How we built a production bank statement analysis platform at Airtel Payments Bank using Ollama, NVIDIA GPU, Django, Celery, and Ray.

item.title: Django Backend Architecture for Fintech at Scale
item.description: REST API design, PostgreSQL patterns, and background job architecture for financial platforms — lessons from 12+ years in fintech.

item.title: Scaling Python Workers with Celery, RabbitMQ, and Ray
item.description: Distributed processing patterns for high-volume PDF and CSV ingestion in banking and enterprise systems.
